prompt: Write a 100-word elevator pitch for the openpatent.ai auto-disclose cron daemon: every 6 hours, the hive sweeps a vault directory, finds new files, batch-discloses them via POST /v1/disclosure, hashes them with SHA-3/512, writes a hash-chained audit log entry, optionally signs with OTS. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {pitch: string}.
